allow: PowerShell($pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $pid" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 8080" })

PowerShell($owningPid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($owningPid\) { Stop-Process -Id $owningPid -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $owningPid" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 8080" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/auth/token" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"alice","password":"alice123"}' -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell($owningPid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($owningPid\) { Stop-Process -Id $owningPid -Force; Write-Output "Killed $owningPid" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 8080" })
